name: agrivest
description: Agri Vest — agricultural investment platform (ledger core, M-Pesa, API + React frontend)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @agrivest/ledger && npm run build -w @agrivest/marketplace && npm run build -w @agrivest/api && vite build
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @agrivest/ledger && npm run build -w @agrivest/marketplace && npm run build -w @agrivest/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @agrivest/ledger && npm run typecheck -w @agrivest/marketplace && npm run typecheck -w @agrivest/api
